subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto those who have cast aside the world and taken what the Most Great Name hath brought forth herein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذین نبذوا العالم و اخذوا ما اتی به الاسم الاعظم فیهذا
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @power of the Manifestation of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action
